heading: Inland Empire regional water recycling project
label: 390h–21 Inland Empire regional water recycling project
notes: CodificationSection is based on section “16——” of . Two other sections “16——” of have been enacted and are classified to sections 390h–22 and 390h–23 of this title.Pub. L. 102–575Pub. L. 102–575

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The Secretary, in cooperation with the Inland Empire Utilities Agency, may participate in the design, planning, and construction of the Inland Empire regional water recycling project described in the report submitted under .section 390h–4(c) of this title

children.heading: Cost sharing
children.label: b Cost sharing
children.text: The Federal share of the cost of the project described in subsection (a) shall not exceed 25 percent of the total cost of the project.

children.heading: Limitation
children.label: c Limitation
children.text: Funds provided by the Secretary shall not be used for operation and maintenance of the project described in subsection (a).

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: d Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There is authorized to be appropriated to carry out this section, $20,000,000.
